summary: Tested all 4 bug fixes (province selection, job_title/phone in profile, admin edit → profile sync, real-time validation). Found and fixed 2 additional bugs: Profile form blocked by HTML5 required validation (noValidate fix) and admin customers list not returning job_title/phone for pre-population in edit dialog (backend projection fix). All 4 original bugs confirmed fixed.

minor.issue: Users projection was missing job_title and phone fields — edit dialog could not pre-populate them. FIXED by adding job_title and phone to $project stage in MongoDB aggregation.

ui_bugs.issue: Profile form lacked noValidate — HTML5 required validation on address fields (line1, city, postal) blocked form submission entirely when address was empty. Customer could NOT save any profile changes (job_title, phone, name). FIXED by adding noValidate to <form>.
Country field shows 'Select country...' even when country is set to 'CA' — Radix Select doesn't display the label for pre-populated country code. Minor display-only issue; value is saved correctly.

action_items: Country field in admin Edit Customer dialog shows 'Select country...' even when country='CA' is set — investigate Radix Select initialization timing in admin CustomersTab.tsx
Consider whether address fields in Profile should be truly required (or change to optional) — currently required by schema but customers may not need to fill them to save job_title/phone
critical_code_review_comments: Profile.tsx lacked noValidate — HTML5 form validation was silently blocking all profile saves when address fields were empty. Added noValidate to fix.

Admin /api/admin/customers list projection: user object only had {id, email, full_name, is_active} — missing job_title and phone. This caused the admin edit dialog to show empty values for these fields. Any save from admin would clear those fields. Fixed by adding job_title and phone to the $project stage.

Profile.tsx address init: address from GET /me is empty {} for new customers — but required HTML attributes on line1/city/postal prevented any form submission. noValidate is the correct short-term fix.
GET /api/admin/customers users array now includes job_title and phone — admin edit dialog is pre-populated correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/admin/customers.py (added job_title and phone to user projection)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all 4 bugs confirmed fixed; country display in admin edit dialog is minor)

seed_data_creation: Created test customer: test.profile2.iter265@test.local (password: TestPass123!, partner: aa, tenant: 81bdc4a0-adfd-4fe2-8243-f0a562fc54b9). Also created test.profile.iter265@test.local under automate-accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 original bugs are fixed and verified. T1 (iter 265) also fixed: 1) Profile.tsx noValidate (address required fields blocking profile save), 2) Admin customers list backend projection to include job_title/phone. Test customer: test.profile2.iter265@test.local / TestPass123! / partner:aa. Minor: admin edit dialog country shows 'Select country...' for pre-populated CA value.

rca_of_issues.Bug1_province_cleared: UniversalFormRenderer was dispatching ALL 6 address keys on every change; Signup.tsx's handleFieldChange for country reset region=''. Fixed by only dispatching changed keys.
rca_of_issues.Bug2_job_title_missing_from_me: GET /me did not return job_title. Fixed in auth.py.
rca_of_issues.Bug2_profile_save_blocked: Profile.tsx form had no noValidate — HTML5 required validation on addr-line1, addr-city, addr-postal blocked form submission when address was empty. Added noValidate.
rca_of_issues.Bug3_admin_edit_empty_job_title: Admin /api/admin/customers list MongoDB $project for user field was missing job_title and phone, so setSelectedCustomer spread had no job_title/phone. Fixed by adding those fields to projection.
rca_of_issues.Bug4_validation: UniversalFormRenderer had no inline validation. Email regex and phone regex validation added, showing inline error on blur/change.
